caption: A man with short brown hair, wearing a dark blue blazer over a black collared shirt, stands at a podium against a plain, light gray background. In the upper corners of the scene, a logo and the text "mediasite" are visible. On the podium, there is a slender black microphone and a clear plastic water bottle with a blue cap. Across the sequence, the man is speaking, with his mouth opening and closing and his head shifting slightly. He gestures with his hands, which are positioned in front of him near the water bottle. The camera angle and the setting remain static throughout the frames, capturing only the slight movements of the man as he delivers a presentation.
